reviews.review_description: Fun game with some mildly irritating mechanics, but they seemed to have released it without testing it as there are TONS of issues. There are multiple game breaking bugs such as defeating all enemies but not registering as mission complete, or deliver cargo missions where it won't let you deliver them. Descriptions hover over the screen and you have to do various things every time to get them out of your way. The icon for what resource it costs is only 20% viewable in the corner, making it hard to even tell WHAT you're spending, let alone how much you have. Every time you complete a wave it pops up the upgrade menu too close to your face, I always have to move it away EVERY WAVE. I got to the boss wave and at the very end of the fight my vehicle was destroyed by invisible fire on the ground which meant game over. Grabbing and moving units can be frustrating as it can be finicky and will move units "near" where you try to release them. It's easy to accidentally activate your ability and there's no way to cancel. 1/4 of the time the button doesn't even appear to let you use your ability. There's another game breaking bug where a button shows you what your controls are, but often after that no other buttons will work and you can't play anymore. I've had to reset my game multiple times because of this, and multiple times for other game breaking bugs. I've played 25 hours and want to finish the game but I don't know that it's worth my time to keep trying and hoping the game will let me continue.

reviews.review_title: The game is impossible to complete.
reviews.review_description: The game is impossible to complete after the final boss in New Germany. The three canisters you pick up after killing the boss, which need to be placed in the central EMP tower, can't be placed at three points. The indicators disappear, and the trigger for placing them doesn't work. As a result, the mission cannot be completed. The same problem occurs in the additional missions to deliver the fuel tank to the car. This is also impossible to complete. The game is certainly quite good, but bugs and optimization ruin everything. The game lags and sometimes crashes during boss battles. The free RAM runs out, and the game freezes or even closes. I would have given the game 4 stars even taking into account the lag, but the inability to complete the game only costs 1 star. Some kind of beta test is in progress. I'm playing on Q3 firmware 79 with touch controls.

reviews.review_title: Just a few more patches devs!
reviews.review_description:
Upon release the game played terribly.. But after the patch, it plays a lot better.  Still, the biggest issue is not being able to pick up and move your mechs like you should be able to.  What happens is instead of picking up your mech, you grab the battlefield instead and move the whole map.

Devs, this could be fixed better.  Dont make the level so easy to be grabbed.  It shouldn't be able to be grabbed from the top at all.. especially not by any of the structures.  You have a mech next to a tree, you end up grabbing the tree.  I have figured out how to play with few problems now, by just rotating the board when a mech is close to structures.  But it should not be a problem.  Heck, make it where you have to use both hands to grab the map/level/board.. Problem solved.  

Even with the issues, I do actually like the gameplay.  Fix the game, throw it in a sale and it could still be salvaged.  There is a great game hiding among the problems.

It was a strategy game that looked very appealing, but unfortunately, when the game was released, it was almost unplayable. The controls/handling were unnatural, and the game had performance issues. However, after the patch was released, it got much better. It became easier to pick up and manipulate characters, and the gameplay is very enjoyable. With a little more refinement, this could be a must-play VR strategy game.

Update after latest patch: The devs kept working. Read the patch notes for details, but safe to say, the game seems to run about the same, though, luckily improvements have been made to the smoothness and ease of gameplay.
Graphically it is still an uneven mess with HEADLESS soldiers roaming around base and pallets lifting themselves into the air. 
Devs! Work on how it looks now! If the base has signs written in the dirt, I obviously don’t need immersion breaking ui floating around above them, with the exact same text!
I do play this game more than any other, so it is definitely fun! Oh, and the first boss is bugged now, invisible and unmoving.
Looking forward to patch 2! Keep up the good work!

Original review: Why release the game in this state?

This reminds me of the Hitman release, eventually Hitman got fixed and is now a fun game to play. 
That said, Grit and Valor suffers from the same lazy problems that still plague Hitman: Flat screens with story elements and options floating around in a black void. 

When starting the game up, it becomes clear that this is a lazy port, and probably not tested to well, with tons of little, annoying bugs.

The graphics are simply not optimized for the Q3. A quick tweak on the Quest Games Optimizer reveals how good this game could run. Sad.

Did they run out of money to work on this?

Will they release some fixes to make it less broken like Hitman?
Or simply give up, like Civ7? 
We will see.

The four stars are for the core gameplay, and the potential of this version of the game.

Dev to do list: 
Fix frame stutters, up graphical resolution, get hand tracking working and PUT HEADS ON THE LITTLE SOLDIERS AT THE HQ!!!

Definitely heading in the right direction, still missing heads of the workers,but grabbing the units is alot better since the update.if your sitting on the wall thinking of purchasing....its worth it to be honest,kinda wish people would change there stars to reflect the changes

I was really looking forward to this one, unfortunately it's barely playable in the current state. I couldn't get hand tracking to work and playing with controllers is very inaccurate and cumbersome. Also most of the text is difficult to read and flickering is giving me a headache. It's a shame, because the game seems solid and just those technical issues are getting in your way.

developer_response.body:
UPDATE: Hi there, our patch fix for Grit is now live! This should hopefully fix a lot of the issues you were experiencing :) Bear in mind however, hand tracking is not a feature of this game. 

If you continue to experience issues, please do let us know. - Sean 


-- 
 thanks for leaving your feedback for us. We're really sorry that your experience has been poor! The devs are working hard on further patches to provide fixes to improve your experience. 

Hand tracking is not a feature of this game however, so it is designed to be played with controllers. 

If you'd like to give us more details on your experience, please DM us on discord or nDreams X. - Sean

reviews.review_description: At the release of this game I bought it because I love strategy games and retrofuturistic themes, but the reprojection and the grabing mechanic were awlful. Now with the updates and the halloween sales I decided to give it a try. The reprojection is still a issue and the grabing mechanic is still terrible but there is an alternative that makes the game playable (equivalent to point and click). After some tries I started enjoing the roguelike aspects, the variety of mechs and items that makes the game very engaging and fun. In the end is a flatscreen port but at least it brings more variety to the VR catalog.
Need update for more to add things to your base like test gun rang for the mech moke battle see how they function with upgrade parts and way more missions be awesome

I’m giving it 4 ⭐️s because it has the foundation to be a great little rogue-lite strategy game but at the pace update’s are coming it’s not looking good, the core gameplay mechanic is grab units to move and attack, grab units to move behind cover, to use abilities etc etc, you can’t do that when that mechanic has 2 bindings on it, it’s also grab to move map around play space, to rotate world, it’s just really broken right now, on top of that your hand has to be so close to the unit to try and grab it and that’s if it even registers your hand in the first place, that or you accidentally grab the map, so frustrating, so basically when you lose it’s not because you’re not good or it’s too hard, you loose because it doesn’t work, I just played 2 hours and lost 4 times to buggy controls, bums me out.

Very fun game and concept, was obviously released without addressing major bugs and is unplayable in its present state... beyond control issues and inconsistencies, certain missions do not clear upon completion, regardless of inputs, rerunning the map or restarting the app. I'd give it 4 stars if it worked but I can't even get through my second run without consistently running into run ruining bugs

developer_response.body:
UPDATE: Hi there, our patch fix for Grit is now live! This should hopefully fix a lot of the issues you were experiencing. Hopefully your experience with controls input and smoothness of runs should be easier now. 

If you continue to experience issues, please do let us know. - Sean 

--- 

Hi there, we really sorry to hear that your experience has been poor for our game, but we appreciate you taking the time to leave a review for us. 

The team are aware of some of the difficulties in the game at launch and are working hard to address your feedback, particularly around player experience and gameplay. 

Thank you for playing our game, and hopefully you'll come back to it! For further comments, feel free to drop us a line on nDreams X or our official discord server, (/ndreamsvr). - Sean

reviews.review_description:
I am happy that more variety of games are coming for Meta Quest, including this game, but at the time of this review, the game feels unplayable.  No 60 FPS, graphics are muddy, and the game is quite buggy. 

Also, the controls need improvement; they should follow games like Demeo in terms of camera movement

developer_response.body:
UPDATE: Hi there, our patch fix for Grit is now live! This should hopefully fix a lot of the issues you were experiencing :) 

If you continue to experience issues, please do let us know. - Sean 

--

Hi there, we're sorry to hear that you're experience hasn't been good with our game. Thank you for taking the time to leave feedback however. We're working hard on bringing improvements to this version of the game and will be notifying players when they're ready! - Sean

reviews.review_description:
This game has a lot of potential and I want to support the developer, so I’m not asking for a refund. That said, in its current state I find it unplayable. I can’t pick up the mech when prompted, the heavy anti-aliasing makes everything look noisy and blurry, and the floating signs are distracting as they move around with small head movements.

I think it just needs some patches and polish — once that happens, I’ll be glad to come back and update my review. For now, I’ll wait for improvements, because I’d really like to see this game succeed.

developer_response.body:
UPDATE: Hi there, we can now confirm our first patch is out! This should hopefully address the issues you've been experiencing :)  

If you continue to experience issues, please do let us know. - Sean 

--

Hi there! Thank you for playing our game and being patient with us while we work on addressing player feedback from launch. We appreciate some features are not working as intended and the team has heard your feedback. 

We'll be letting everyone know when a patch is ready! - Sean

reviews.review_description: Kinda reminds me of a Warhammer strategy game I’ve played a while back I find the game interesting and fun plus if you die you just upgrade and go at it again plus the pause button is gonna be your best friend to help you maneuver around the battlefield upgrade and think of how will your abilities benefit you cause once you get to the ￼boss and beat him you’ll get more rewards it’s tough ￼but rewarding give it a chance and you’ll learn to have fun ￼￼ ￼

developer_response.body: Hi there, thanks for leaving such a great review! We're happy to hear you're enjoying Grit and Valor :D

I likethe. Game, but really fix the issues in the controlls.
Table zoom and up and down must only works when ugot ur hand on the side ring.

For example look atthe controlls from angry birds that works great.
And it must be better to take the mechs

Please do reach out on socials or at discord.gg/ndreams if you want to report further issues. - Sean

reviews.review_description: It has Quest Achievements and I'm having fun with it! Could use a patch update but has a lot of potential.
